Headline: Closure Update - Malvern St James, Worcestershire
Info: Parents have launched a campaign to save Malvern St James from closure, with the school confirming that conversations regarding its future are ongoing and all expressions of interest are being considered.

Headline: Closure - Logiealmond Primary School (State), Perthshire
Info: Perth and Kinross Council will consider an options appraisal later this week that includes the possible permanent closure of Logiealmond Primary School due to a significant decline in local pupil numbers.

Headline: Closure Update - St Joseph's College, Reading
Info: Following the announcement of the independent school's potential closure on 10 July, local MPs have issued official responses. They are actively working with borough councils to support families and secure alternative educational placements for affected pupils.
